chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.Nos.D-4747, 5099, 5343, 5461 & 5626 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.21058/2024 2.For hearing of main case. 05.05.2025 M/s.Iijaz Ahmed Zahid, Shams Mohiuddin, Naveed Sultan & Syed Muhammad Hassan Meeza, Advocates for the Petitioners. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Abdul Ghaffar, Advocate for the Respondent No.6 in C.P.No.D-5461/2024 Mr.Munawar Ali Memon, Advocate for the Respondent. Per learned counsel for the petitioners in all these petitions the subject matter is applications and or revisions pending before the learned Chief Commissioner / Commissioner Inland Revenue. Learned counsel for the petitioners seeks that these applications be decided expeditiously preferably within a period of 60 days vide speaking orders after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners, and pending the aforesaid, the interim relief granted vide order dated 30.09.2024 may subsist. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and he states that these petitions may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Let copy of this order be placed in each connected petition. Judge Judge nasir
